name: 异界仙踪Immortal Sword
short_description: Immortal Sword is a strategy and role-playing game that combines tower defense, tower pushing, and lightweight rouge. You will defeat various strong enemies in the world of swords and magic, gradually regaining your power.
detailed_description:
Immortal Sword is a strategy and role-playing game that combines tower defense, tower pushing, and lightweight rouge. You will defeat various strong enemies in the world of swords and magic, gradually regaining your power.

Because your power is sealed, you need to learn to use the power of the surrounding environment to protect yourself (such as defense towers of ruins, magical plants, etc.) and defeat enemies. At this time, the gameplay is mainly based on tower defense, with 30+defense towers to choose from.

As your strength grows, you no longer rely on defense towers to protect yourself. The friendly forces you encounter will also become stronger, and you will join a more dangerous battlefield. At this time, the gameplay is mainly based on soldier hedging, with 6 forces and over 60 types of troops to choose from.

As your strength gradually returns to its peak, you will challenge all the strong in this world.
